05 · Wardrobe

Silence is the finest hardware.

Inspect our hinges. Feel the softness of a well-engineered close.

Hardware

Every Mazix hinge is torque-tested for 80,000 open-close cycles. That's roughly 20 open-closes a day for 15 years — silent, precise, uncompromising luxury.

06 · Study

A room for deep work.

Floating shelves.
Grounded thought.

Assam plywood core, Virgo laminate face, invisible cable channels. A workspace built to disappear so the work can take the stage.

Face
Virgo Laminate
Hinges
Hepo German
Structure

"We don't sell materials.
We help you build a home."

09 · Frequently Asked Questions

Interior design insights & queries.

We highly recommend Century Prowud or Action TESA HDMR boards for modular kitchens in Rishikesh's climate. They offer maximum density and moisture resistance, preventing swelling and warping over decades of use.

HDMR (High-Density Moisture Resistant) boards are made by compressing fine wood fibers under high pressure, providing absolute water resistance and density. Commercial plywood consists of layered veneers which can split or swell in wet zones. HDMR is superior for kitchens, vanities, and bathroom units.

Yes! At Jagdamba Timber Works, we design and manufacture bespoke veneered doors, membranic entries, and custom wardrobe panels at our local studio workshop, tailored to your site measurements and styling choice.

Yes. In addition to serving Rishikesh, we regularly distribute premium decorative laminates (Virgo, Black Cobra) and silent-close cabinet fittings (Mazix, HEPO) to building projects and carpenters across Haridwar, Dehradun, and Uttarakhand.

For bedroom wardrobes and TV units, we recommend MR (Moisture Resistant) or BWP (Boiling Water Proof) grade plywood, combined with premium wood veneers or structural laminates to resist temperature changes.

Quality Assurance & Trust

Why builders, architects & homeowners
choose Jagdamba.

Retail & Wholesale

Direct volume pricing for major commercial builders, architects, carpenters, and residential homeowners.

Genuine Products

Authorized partner channels with verified manufacturer warranties and official batch certifications.

Jagdamba Doors Manufacturer

Custom sizing, engineered solid cores, and bespoke veneers designed and manufactured in our local workshop.

Trusted Brands

Authorized dealership status with Century Ply, Action TESA, Virgo Laminates, Black Cobra, and HEPO fittings.

Competitive Pricing

Highly competitive sourcing prices on premium wood panels and hardware fittings.

Expert Guidance

Over 40 years of combined master woodworking and design engineering expertise to guide your project.

Fast Delivery

Prompt logistics and direct transport networks delivering directly to building sites.

Serving Rishikesh & Nearby

Prompt supply routes serving Gumaniwala, Tapovan, Haridwar, Dehradun, and surrounding Uttarakhand zones.
